author: vvo
subject: chore: dev stack tooling
body:
+ eslint react/ fixes (disallow `{ value }` in jsx for consistency)
+ provide a good `npm run dev` using webpack
Webpack provides a build and dev tool in one, easy to setup. Less
less moving parts
Otherwise you need: browserify, watchify, http-server, browser-sync
+ build using webpack and uglifyjs
+ show minified, gzipped build size
+ add travis.yml
